SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.storage

Class NInt64

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNField
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNElementary
com.nib.commons.storage.AbstractNNumeric
com.nib.commons.storage.NInteger
com.nib.commons.storage.NInt64
All Implemented Interfaces:
IDataArea, IntegerVariable, Cloneable
public class NInt64 extends NInteger
The NInt64 class represents a 64-bit signed integer data type. It extends the functionality of the NInteger class and provides additional methods to configure and manipulate the data type. The class is initialized with a size of 8 bytes and indicates that it is a signed number.

  • Constructor Details

    • NInt64

      public NInt64()
      Constructs a new instance of the NInt64 class. This class represents a 64-bit signed integer and is initialized with a fixed size of 8 bytes and is marked as signed. The constructor invokes the parent class NInteger with the parameters specifying the size in bytes (8) and signedness (true). It ensures that all instances of NInt64 are properly configured as signed 64-bit integers.
